name: Self-generated Error Message Containing Sensitive Information
description: The product identifies an error condition and creates its own diagnostic or error message that contains sensitive information such as file paths, database details, or internal system configuration.
detection_pattern: Look for EGRESS nodes (error responses, log output) that carry data from STRUCTURAL nodes (file paths, config values, internal state) without a TRANSFORM mediator that sanitizes or generalizes the error message before it reaches the user.
